name: contentforge
description: Enterprise content production pipeline, now installable on **Claude Code + Cowork, OpenAI Codex, and Cursor** via platform-native manifests (`.claude-plugin/`, `.codex-plugin/`, `.cursor-plugin/`) sharing a single `skills/` directory. **v3.11.0** is the cross-platform compatibility pack — see `docs/cross-platform-install.md`. **v3.10.0** added end-to-end-tested C2PA content provenance for the .docx output (EU AI Act Article 50 compliance, applicable 2 Aug 2026): new --c2pa-sign flag on scripts/generate-docx.py with .docx-embed-if-supported + verifiable .c2pa.json sidecar fallback. Plus May 2026 AEO reality update in Phase 6 SEO/GEO optimizer (Google AI Overviews 55% prevalence + 61% organic CTR drop, citation source skew by engine, LLMs.txt companion standard, Profound/Otterly/Conductor measurement integration references). v3.9.6 reflected Google's March 2026 core update demoting FAQ/HowTo/Review schema on non-primary pages. v3.9 humanizer with 29-pattern AI-detection catalog. Multi-plugin coexistence: zero global hooks, zero auto-connecting MCPs.
